# pfsense_interfaces (Data Source)

Retrieves all [interface assignments](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/interfaces/index.html).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_interfaces" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `interfaces` (Attributes List) List of interface assignments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces))

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `block_bogons` (Boolean) Block bogon networks from entering via this interface.
- `block_private` (Boolean) Block private networks (RFC 1918) from entering via this interface.
- `description` (String) Friendly description for the interface.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the interface is enabled.
- `ipv4_address` (String) IPv4 address when ipv4_type is 'staticv4'.
- `ipv4_gateway` (String) IPv4 gateway name for this interface.
- `ipv4_subnet` (String) IPv4 subnet prefix length (e.g. '24') when ipv4_type is 'staticv4'.
- `ipv4_type` (String) IPv4 configuration type. Options: `none`, `staticv4`, `dhcp`, `pppoe`, `pptp`, `l2tp`.
- `ipv6_address` (String) IPv6 address when ipv6_type is 'staticv6'.
- `ipv6_gateway` (String) IPv6 gateway name for this interface.
- `ipv6_subnet` (String) IPv6 subnet prefix length (e.g. '64') when ipv6_type is 'staticv6'.
- `ipv6_type` (String) IPv6 configuration type. Options: `none`, `staticv6`, `dhcp6`, `slaac`, `6to4`, `6rd`, `track6`.
- `logical_name` (String) Logical name of the interface assignment (e.g. 'wan', 'lan', 'opt1'). Automatically assigned on creation.
- `mss` (Number) Maximum Segment Size for TCP connections on this interface.
- `mtu` (Number) Maximum Transmission Unit for this interface.
- `port` (String) Physical or VLAN interface port name (e.g. 'vmx0', 'vmx2.100').
- `spoof_mac` (String) Spoofed MAC address for this interface.
